flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 37% at Whittier College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (812 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Whittier College rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($30.2k → $35.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Whittier College rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($13.8k → $16.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Whittier College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (59.6% → 52.6%).
